title: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection and Testing, Surface preparation and painting of Spud cans
content:
Project Name: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection and Testing, Surface preparation and painting of Spud cans.
Client: Navtech Marine Services.
Project code: 4020012.
Description: Scope - Supply, Fabrication, Inspection and Testing, Surface preparation and painting of Spud cans including Jet Piping for Pandan 4504.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Oil and Gas.
Status: Completed.
Duration: April 2020 – July 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
